title: Puzzle Code
description:
Puzzle Code is a mod that contains a lot of Blocks and Items useful for creating mechanisms, maps, games etc.

Made in MCreator
body:
![2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lQI4JCnA/images/390b3f9732982dfda9cd104b82a782b5055490db.png)

## About
**Puzzle Code** is a mod designed in creating maps, doing experiments and having unlimited freedom with your creation.
